untranslatable_reason: Symmetric triangle pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (converging trendlines with equal slopes) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires identifying the geometric formation itself, not just price levels. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection but do not capture the symmetric triangle pattern formation requirement.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channels (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) as a technical proxy for symmetric triangle breakout detection in both directions. This captures the breakout element but cannot truly identify the symmetric triangle pattern formation which requires pattern-matching logic beyond the allowed operators. For proper implementation, a custom pattern detection function would be needed.
